category_sources: source_facts.description says D.J. Bernstein's DNS tools; official homepage https://cr.yp.to/djbdns.html is organized around DNS cache/server/client tools.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name; official homepage title uses djbdns.
docs_sources: Official djbdns documentation index on cr.yp.to includes install, cache, server, command-line tool, and library documentation.
repo_sources: No official source-control repository identified; source_facts.source-archive points to the official cr.yp.to tarball, which is not a repository URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executable list include dnscache, tinydns, axfrdns, rbldns, DNS lookup/debug commands; official homepage documents DNS cache/server/client usage.
